title: agrostis tenorei
intro: Agrostis tenorei, also known as Tenore's bentgrass, is a species of grass native to Sardinia. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Agrostis tenorei include its potential to reduce cardiovascular disease risk, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Agrostis tenorei typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves, which can be used to create teas, tonics, or supplements for medicinal purposes.
